brief: Should I rename the variable `x` to `count` in line 42 of helper.py?
Which font should I use for the slide title — Arial or Helvetica?
Should the button label say 'Submit' or 'Send'?
Fix the typo in the README: 'recieve' should be 'receive'.
Should we increase the HTTP timeout from 30 to 60 seconds in the dev config?
Move the logo 5 pixels to the left on the landing page.
Add a comment to the `calculate_tax()` function explaining the formula.
Should the error message say 'An error occurred' or 'Something went wrong'?
Upgrade the lodash dependency from 4.17.20 to 4.17.21 (patch release, no breaking changes).
Change the default pagination size from 10 to 20 items per page in the dev environment.

Launch an EU SMS marketing campaign in Q4 2026 with a $50,000 budget targeting Romania and Bulgaria. Requires GDPR consent flows, MSA with Vox Telecom, and Board approval. Risk: regulatory non-compliance. Success metric: 15,000 trial sign-ups at CPA under $3.

Acquire TechEdge Labs for $2M. The company has declining ARR but owns a 7-patent NLP portfolio. Potential integration risk, $240K undisclosed vendor debt, and two patents under EPO opposition. Requires Board approval. Alternative: license-only at $200K/yr.

Migrate production database from PostgreSQL 13 to PostgreSQL 16 for a service handling 2M daily active users. Requires zero-downtime cutover plan, 3-week rollback window, and sign-off from CTO and VP Engineering. Estimated effort: 6 weeks.

Expand NexusOS into the US market in Q1 2027. Requires SOC 2 Type II certification, US entity incorporation, $1.2M budget, 3 new enterprise sales hires, and legal review of US data residency requirements under state privacy laws.

Terminate the contract with our primary cloud provider (AWS) and migrate all infrastructure to GCP. Estimated migration cost: $400K over 6 months. Risk: 72-hour service disruption window. Requires CISO sign-off, customer communication plan, and Board awareness.

Raise a $5M Series A round at a $25M pre-money valuation. Term sheet from lead investor Accel includes 1x liquidation preference, anti-dilution clause, and board seat. Secondary offer from Sequoia at $22M pre-money with no liquidation preference. Legal counsel review required.

Launch a white-label version of NexusOS for a single enterprise customer (XPeng, €25K contract) with custom branding and a data-isolation guarantee. Requires custom deployment pipeline, 6-month SLA at 99.9% uptime, and dedicated support tier. Risk: sets precedent for future white-label requests.

Promote the current VP of Engineering to CTO, dissolving the interim CTO role. This affects org structure for 40 engineers, requires compensation adjustment of $80K/yr, and changes reporting lines for 3 team leads. Board acknowledgement required.

Implement a mandatory 2-hour 'culture alignment' meeting every Friday for all 80 employees. This reduces billable hours by ~4K hrs/quarter and has been opposed by 60% of staff in the anonymous survey. Legal HR review needed for implications in RO labor law.

Reduce engineering headcount by 20% (8 positions) due to budget constraints. Affected roles: 3 backend engineers, 2 QA, 2 data engineers, 1 DevOps. Severance budget: $120K. Romanian labor law requires 30-day notice and union consultation. Risk: morale impact on remaining team.
